query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a paved walkway with two tall, ornate street lamps positioned along its edge at different distances from the camera. A wide grassy field stretches out to the left, and a single small tree stands in the far background. Fog fills the air, obscuring the horizon and the details of the distant elements.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A monochrome outdoor photograph rendered in washed-out, faded gray tones with oppressively low contrast and weak separation between light and dark. Two tall street lamps line a paved walkway bordering an expansive grassy field, while a small, solitary tree stands barely visible through the fog in the distant background. The heavy, suffocating atmosphere and isolated composition evoke a mood of melancholic unease and quiet dread.
